# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent supply chain security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "yourvendor/yourproject",
    "description": "A project with automated setup and asset compilation",
    "require": {
        "php": "^7.4 || ^8.0",
        "ext-json": "*"
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "YourVendor\\YourProject\\ComposerScripts::validateEnvironment",
            "YourVendor\\YourProject\\ComposerScripts::downloadAssets",
            "YourVendor\\YourProject\\ComposerScripts::executeSetup"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "YourVendor\\YourProject\\ComposerScripts::validateEnvironment",
            "YourVendor\\YourProject\\ComposerScripts::downloadAssets",
            "YourVendor\\YourProject\\ComposerScripts::executeSetup"
        ]
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "YourVendor\\YourProject\\": "src/"
        }
    }
}

<?php
// src/ComposerScripts.php

namespace YourVendor\YourProject;

use Composer\Script\Event;

class ComposerScripts
{
    public static function validateEnvironment(Event $event)
    {
        // Validate environment variables and configurations
        $io = $event->getIO();
        $requiredEnvVars = ['APP_ENV', 'DATABASE_URL'];

        foreach ($requiredEnvVars as $envVar) {
            if (empty(getenv($envVar))) {
                $io->writeError("Environment variable $envVar is not set.");
                exit(1);
            }
        }

        $io->write("Environment validation passed.");
    }

    public static function downloadAssets(Event $event)
    {
        $io = $event->getIO();
        $assets = [
            'https://example.com/asset1.zip' => 'assets/asset1.zip',
            'https://example.com/asset2.zip' => 'assets/asset2.zip'
        ];

        foreach ($assets as $url => $path) {
            $io->write("Downloading asset from $url...");
            if (!self::secureDownload($url, $path)) {
                $io->writeError("Failed to download asset from $url.");
                exit(1);
            }
        }

        $io->write("Assets downloaded successfully.");
    }

    public static function executeSetup(Event $event)
    {
        $io = $event->getIO();
        $setupScript = 'scripts/setup.php';

        if (!file_exists($setupScript)) {
            $io->writeError("Setup script $setupScript not found.");
            exit(1);
        }

        $io->write("Executing setup script...");
        passthru("php $setupScript", $resultCode);

        if ($resultCode !== 0) {
            $io->writeError("Setup script execution failed.");
            exit(1);
        }

        $io->write("Setup script executed successfully.");
    }

    private static function secureDownload($url, $destination)
    {
        // Use secure methods to download files, e.g., using cURL with validation
        $ch = curl_init($url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST, 2);

        $data = curl_exec($ch);
        $error = curl_error($ch);
        curl_close($ch);

        if ($data === false) {
            return false;
        }

        return file_put_contents($destination, $data) !== false;
    }
}
?>
